sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17502" key="au)cobi/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐξο-βίος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n17502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">increasing in wealth,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).119</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
